title: ottelia macrantha
intro: Ottelia macrantha, also known as the golden water-plantain, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the family Hydrocharitaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Ottelia macrantha include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, and it has also been used to treat respiratory issues and digestive problems. Ottelia macrantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal use, and it has also been traditionally used in traditional medicine practices in various parts of the world.
